eval-prompt-content-quality: Step 3 should instruct Claude to expand the user's request into a self-contained task description, not just pass through raw input. The spawned agent has no conversation context — the prompt must stand alone.
eval-base-ref-passthrough: The skill needs explicit guidance on parsing flags like --base from $ARGUMENTS. Currently Claude must guess that --base is a passthrough flag for setup-worktree.sh. Consider adding an argument parsing section or documenting supported flags.
